_comment: EMERGENCY 2026-04-08: removed the apex-to-www redirect rule from this file. It conflicted with next.config.mjs canonical-host normalization, creating an infinite ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS loop that took the site totally down. The site's canonical URLs (src/app/layout.tsx metadataBase, src/app/sitemap.ts BASE_URL, OpenGraph URLs, JSON-LD Organization schema, src/app/llms.txt) all use the bare apex weightlossrankings.org, NOT www. Adding a Vercel-level apex-to-www redirect fought every other source of truth in the codebase. If the canonical needs to flip to www in the future, change it consistently across all of those files in a single commit, do NOT just add a Vercel-level redirect.
